arxiv.title: Learning to Ask: When LLM Agents Meet Unclear Instruction
arxiv.abstract: Equipped with the capability to call functions, modern large language models (LLMs) can leverage external tools for addressing a range of tasks unattainable through language skills alone. arxiv.title: Large Language Models-Enabled Digital Twins for Precision Medicine in Rare Gynecological Tumors
arxiv.abstract: Rare gynecological tumors (RGTs) present major clinical challenges due to their low incidence and heterogeneity. arxiv.abstract: The digitization of historical documents is crucial for preserving the cultural heritage of the society. arxiv.abstract: Sleep is crucial for human health, and EEG signals play a significant role in sleep research.
